folio.label: 202r
folio.l: The tåmentour , but for no maner chaunce
He mygút nat smyte , al hire nekke a two
And for æäe was that tyme , an ordinaunce
That noman , shulde do man , swicú penaunce
The ferthe strok to smyten , softe or soore
This turmentour , ne durste do nomore
¢ But half ded , w hire nekke I koruen there

note.notetxt: 533Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: He lefte hire lye , and on his wey is went
The céstene folk , whicú æ a boute hire were
Witú shetes , han the blod , ful faire I hent
Three dayes lyued she , in this turment
And neuäe cessed , hem the feitú to prechetecheprecheteche
That she had fostred , he~ , she gan to preche
And he~ she ©af , hire meebles & hire thyng

note.notetxt: 540Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: And to the Pope vrban , bytok hem tho
And seide , I axed this of heuene kyng
To haue respit , three dayes and no moo
To recomende to ©ow , er that I go
Theise soules lo , and that I mygút do werche
Heere of myn hous , ¹petuelly a chirche
¢ Seynt vrban , witú hise dekenes priuely

note.notetxt: 547Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: The body fette , and buryed it by nygúte
A mong hise othere Seyntes , honestly
Hire hous , the Chirche of Seynt Cecile higúte
Seynt vrban halwed it , as he wel mygúte
In whicú , in to this day , in noble wyse
Men don to Crist , and to his seynt seruyse
Heere endetú the Secund No~nes tale ;
